title: Feedback - send a Suggestion feedback without names/email
scenario: Suggestion feedback can be sent via App Settings > Feedback without providing name or email
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to the Home screen.
Tap on App Settings (gear icon or settings option).
Enter text in the feedback text field (leave Name and Email fields blank).
expected: Feedback is sent successfully without requiring a name or email address.
